title: Steve Chorney

{{Top|rwp}}

'''Steve Chorney''' is an illustrator. He was the cover artist for the junior book series ''[[Star Wars: Galaxy of Fear]]'' and ''[[Choose Your Own Star Wars Adventure]]''.<ref name="Stevenchorney">{{WebCite|url=http://www.stevenchorney.com|text=Home|work=[http://www.stevenchorney.com StevenChorney.com]|archivedate=20231003175018}}</ref> He also illustrated nine cards in the [[2021 Topps Chrome Star Wars Galaxy|2021 ''Topps Chrome Star Wars Galaxy'']] set.<ref name="Cardboard Connection">{{CardCon|url=2021-topps-chrome-star-wars-galaxy-trading-cards|text=2021 Topps Chrome Star Wars Galaxy Checklist, Boxes, Reviews|archivedate=20230610115054}}</ref>

Chorney has created book covers, trading cards, movie posters, and other printed media from the 1970s to the 2020s. He is best known for his movie posters, which have made a significant impact on the development of the genre.<ref name="Art of the Movies">{{WebCite|url=https://artofthemovies.co.uk/blogs/original-movie-posters/the-artists-steve-chorney-and-the-stunning-poster-for-once-upon-a-time-in-hollywood|text=The Artists - Steve Chorney and the Stunning Poster for Once Upon A Time In Hollywood|work=[https://artofthemovies.co.uk Art of the Movies]|archivedate=20220708233759}}</ref> 

{{Artist-stub}}
